# tokens: # the named entries from a map (or record) and binds each to a bare word
# in the current scope. v1 supports explicit names only; missing keys and
# capitalised (type) names are errors. See lang/go/native/native_unpack.go.
def m {a:1 b:2} unpack [a b] m a add b
def m {x:1 y:2} unpack [y] m y
note: binds only the named entry, not others

# tokens: def m {n:10} unpack [n] m n mul 2
note: bound value is usable in expressions
refuses to bind a capitalised (type) name
